title: Foleo
content:
Palm has just introduced [this](http://www.palm.com/us/products/mobilecompanion/foleo/index.html?creativeID=US_BB_foleo_announcement) today. ... "The perfect companion for your smartphone."

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/05/foleo.jpg)

Wait .. let me read that again. _"The perfect companion for your smartphone."_ ... So I have to carry a phone and also this hugh electronic thingie?!?

I'd rather carry a notebook. So, thanks but **no thanks!**
